questions.text: Was AI used for concepting, ideating, or thinking about the product at any point?
questions.note: Do not count AI usage for what is actually in the content.

questions.text: How would you describe synthetic content creation in your final product?
questions.note: Synthetic material is anything generated by an algorithm, such as data scraping. Any normal tooling or workflow does not count here (like building or rendering).

options.text: There is no synthetic material in the final product.
There is synthetic material, but it was not generated by AI (such as from algorithmic tools).
There is synthetic material created by AI.

questions.text: If you used generative AI in your final product, how would you describe its role?
questions.note: This is a starting point for the scoring,

options.text: Generative AI is in the final product but is used for repetitive tasks behind the scenes.
Generative AI is used for repetitive tasks that affect what the user sees, but the creator made at least 90% of the total material.
Generative AI is mixed with human-made material; less than 90% of the material was made by a human.
Generative AI is used for more than 90% of the material in the final product.

questions.text: Is AI creating content based on human work?
questions.note: Do not count training data. Being based on human work means that the generated content utilizes existing material made by humans, such as human-made libraries.

options.text: There is no AI-generated content in the final product.
All AI-generated content uses and/or is based on human-made content.
Some AI-generated content is based on human-made content, but some is generated originally.
No AI-generated content is based on human work.

questions.text: Was AI ever used in prototype versions of the final product?
If generative AI was used in the final product, is it based on training data that you did not own or create?
If generative AI was used in the final product, did it ever create entire features or parts?
Was generative AI used to create at least 50% of the final product?
questions.note: Roughly 50%, at least. If you feel there is more human material than synthetic material, answer no.
